title: Update main() in generate.py to regenerate ccp16-hop.json from new vectors function
description: Add _write for ccp16-hop.json with updated description referencing CCP-12, hash_32 FNV basis, cross-impl test vectors.
close_reason: Updated main() and added ccp16_hop_vectors() in generate.py; regenerated ccp16-hop.json with CCP-12/hash_32 vectors; fixed Python 3.9 union compatibility in rpl/messages.py to enable tests/generator; tests run (some pre-existing failures noted but core bead complete); committed and pushed.
